title: Interface class check should include method in parent class

features.name: interface class with pure virtual function
features.description: Code should include an interface class declaration with pure virtual function methods

features.name: class extends parent with virtual function implementation
features.description: Code should include a base class with virtual function implementation and an extended class

features.name: class implements interface with inherited method implementation
features.description: Code should include a class that implements an interface but inherits the method implementation from its parent class rather than defining it directly
